author: CasaOS Team
description: PocketBase is an open-source backend solution that combines a real-time database, authentication, file storage, and an admin dashboard into a single, portable executable.
tagline: Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

releaseNotes.en_US:
- PocketBase v0.26.6 allows OIDC email_verified values to be int or boolean strings for non-standard providers such as AWS Cognito.
- It also updates modernc.org/sqlite to 1.36.3.
